case_title: CHLOE FORTUNATO VS. RYAN HALL et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,101.00 FILED BY FORTUNATO, CHLOE AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, RYAN BRIZENDINE, ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HALL, RYAN BRIZENDINE, ELIZABETH
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT IS "APPROVED", AND TRIAL CONTINUED TO MAY-09-2012 AT 10:00 AM DEPT.#506 - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-09-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORTUNATO, CHLOE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HALL, RYAN BRIZENDINE, ELIZABETH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
